description: Update the public template to the immutable v0.3.4 release whose package-installed runtime proves exact PEP 610 provenance without GO_STACK_ALLOW_DEV.
acceptance: R-1: The template requires stack version 0.3.4 and immutable ref v0.3.4 resolved exactly to release payload e3fc0adb352eeda9a69e04890486db1eb49482b7.
R-2: The official stack-update transaction records the before and after contract and exact resolved commit without absolute path leakage.
R-3: Local template, Linux WSL, and live Hermes doctor checks pass from the public v0.3.4 tag with GO_STACK_ALLOW_DEV unset and package provenance exact.
R-4: Documentation identifies the v0.3.4 pin and package provenance behavior; GitHub Actions remain unused.

evidence.summary: R-1 complete: official stack update pins required_stack_version 0.3.4 and stack_ref v0.3.4; annotated release tag resolves to payload e3fc0adb352eeda9a69e04890486db1eb49482b7. R-2 complete: rollback record .go/updates/20260716T110629719219Z-v0.3.4-e3fc0adb352e.json preserves v0.3.3 to v0.3.4 before/after state, exact resolved commit, and no absolute paths. R-3 complete: projected final-state scripts/check.sh and GO_REQUIRE_LIVE_HERMES=1 scripts/check-linux.sh passed from fresh public v0.3.4 clones with GO_STACK_ALLOW_DEV unset; fresh uv package doctor ready=true, exact_ref=true, identity_source=pep610-vcs, development_override=false, Hermes path /home/viggo/.local/bin/hermes. Doctor sha256 e78032475872c8ab674ddd3580c6e2cdac69e4dffa7389dc08e055bfd0996995; direct_url sha256 31f139ce1c1b502f66a63410b0e36ae34ccc8c034391780a6e3efaae215307b5. R-4 complete: CHANGELOG documents the v0.3.4 pin and exact official-GitHub PEP 610 provenance; GitHub Actions unused. Fresh-eyes re-review verdict A.
